summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Content Library feature. All backend APIs for 5 content types (homework_template, protocol_template, resource, assessment, note_template) passed CRUD tests. Therapist APIs correctly return admin content with source='admin'. Access control properly denies therapists from admin endpoints. Frontend UI verified with admin login, Content Library navigation, all 5 content type tabs, and create dialog.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: admin_content.py CRUD endpoints correctly use 'type' field to store all content types in single admin_content collection
VERIFIED: admin_content.py require_super_admin() properly checks role == 'super_admin' and returns 403 for non-admins
VERIFIED: clinical.py /homework-templates endpoint (line 1127-1147) correctly queries admin_content collection and adds source='admin' to items
VERIFIED: protocols.py /protocols/templates endpoint (line 166-183) correctly queries admin_content and adds admin templates with ADMIN_ prefix
VERIFIED: resources.py /resources endpoint (line 149-168) correctly queries admin_content and adds admin resources to response
VERIFIED: assessments.py /assessments/library endpoint (line 95-113) correctly queries admin_content and adds admin assessments with ADMIN_ prefix
VERIFIED: AdminContentLibrary.js has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
VERIFIED: SuperAdminDashboard.js includes Content Library nav item (id='content-library') and renders AdminContentLibrary component

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Admin login, Content Library navigation, all tabs, create dialog verified

seed_data_creation: Test created sample content items with 'TEST_' prefix which are cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Content Library feature fully tested and working. Backend pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_content.py cover all 5 content types CRUD, therapist visibility of admin content, and access control. Frontend UI verified via Playwright - admin can login, navigate to Content Library, see all 5 tabs, create/edit/delete content.

Therapist Sees Admin Homework Templates.notes: Returns admin items with source='admin' alongside system and therapist templates

Therapist Sees Admin Protocol Templates.notes: Returns admin items with ADMIN_ prefix alongside built-in templates

Therapist Sees Admin Resources.notes: Returns admin items from admin_content collection

Therapist Sees Admin Assessments.notes: Returns admin items with ADMIN_ prefix alongside built-in assessments

Access Control - Therapist Denied Admin.notes: All return 403 Forbidden for therapist token

Frontend - Admin Login.notes: Login form with data-testid selectors works correctly

Frontend - Admin Dashboard.notes: Dashboard loads with sidebar nav including Content Library

Frontend - Content Library Component.notes: AdminContentLibrary component renders with all 5 content type tabs

Frontend - Content Library Create Dialog.notes: Create New button opens dialog with title, category, description, tags fields

api_test_results.GET /api/admin/content: 200 OK - Returns stats for all 5 content types
api_test_results.GET /api/admin/content/homework_template: 200 OK - Lists all admin homework templates
